features: Seamless Hair Ties: Seamless design, suitable for women's thick hair, can fix your hair without damage, easy to wear and remove, without tangles
High Elasticity: The ponytail holder can be easily stretched from 4 cm to 24 cm, providing good elasticity to keep the hair firm and not easy to loosen or break.
Material: The hair band is made of high elastic thick material, soft and elastic; suitable for sports use
Multi Purpose: Easy to use, suitable for different hairstyles, such as ponytails; It is also suitable for thin or thick hair, straight hair, and curly hair
Package: 50 pcs cold brown hair bands with a diameter of 4cm, enough for your daily use; Simple colors easily match all your clothes and hairstyles
